data.title: Ethena Labs launches USDe reserve proof and will publish proof results once a week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethena Labs announced the launch of USDe reserve proof, which was created and launched in cooperation with Harris & Trotter, Chaos Labs, LlamaRisk and Chainlink. USDe reserve proof will publish proof results once a week, which will be independently reviewed by the aforementioned verifiers, and the data sources include blockchain, custodians and exchange partners. In addition, reserve fund assets are not included in the US dollar value of USDe's supporting assets.

data.title: Bitget launches VIP regular airdrop plan, the first project is PROMPT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget officially launched the "VIP Airdrop Ceremony", which is open to VIP3 and above users. Users only need to complete the registration, without additional tasks, to unlock the regular new coin airdrop.
The first airdrop project is PROMPT, with a total prize pool of 150,000 pieces, and the event time is from 20:00 on April 11 to 20:00 on April 18 (UTC+8). Before the end of the event, registered users must maintain VIP3 and above to unlock the current airdrop rewards.

data.title: DWF Labs received another 5 million USD1 9 hours ago, becoming the top 2 institution holding USD1 on the chain
data.description: On-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that DWF Labs has become the top 2 institution holding USD1 on the chain launched by WLFI, and currently holds 6 million USD1. After receiving 1 million stablecoins on April 3, DWF Labs received another 5 million USD1 on the BSC network 9 hours ago, and then crossed the chain to the Ethereum mainnet. In addition, Wintermute should be the top 1 institution holding USD1 on the chain. Currently, the four addresses hold a total of 57 million USD1, which is 9.5 times the size of DWF Labs' holdings.

data.title: Yesterday, Bitcoin spot ETF had a net outflow of $1 million, and Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of $29.2 million
data.description: According to Farside Investors' monitoring, the US Bitcoin spot ETF had a net outflow of US$1 million yesterday; the US Ethereum spot ETF had a net outflow of US$29.2 million.

data.title: Trump family crypto project WLFI bought 4.89 million SEI at an average price of $0.158
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring shows that the Trump family's crypto project World Liberty Financial (WLFI) bought 4.89 million SEIs with 775,000 USDC at an average price of $0.158. It currently holds a total of 5,983,278 SEIs.

data.title: TRON Meme King Challenge went live for 3 days, and the transaction volume surged by 300%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The first TRON chain Meme coin trading event "TRON MEME King Challenge" jointly created by Ave.ai and SunPump has attracted more than 3,000 traders since its opening on April 9. Data shows that the transaction volume on the chain increased by 300% month-on-month in the first three days of the event.
Ave.ai officials revealed that users can share rewards by participating in the battle. Not only will each TRON Meme coin transaction be automatically included in the real-time list, the $15,000 prize pool will be allocated according to the transaction volume gradient, and the system will randomly select 100 participants to share the blind box. Small transactions also have the opportunity to win. There is still one week left before the reward settlement.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based FHE perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget announced that it has launched U-based FHE perpetual contracts with a leverage range of 1-20 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: LBank launches bang (BANG) for the first time
data.description: LBank officially announced that it has launched bang (BANG) for the first time at 10:55 (SGT) on April 12, and opened the BANG/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 11:00 on April 13.

data.title: SEC and Binance Agree to Extend Litigation Hold
data.description:
SEC and Binance propose 60-day litigation pause, impacting crypto regulations.
source: https://coincu.com/331683-sec-binance-litigation-60-day-pause

data.title: Movement: Cornucopia snapshot will be taken tonight, rewards will be distributed and withdrawals will be available next week
data.description: The Movement Foundation has officially announced that it will take a snapshot of Cornucopia tonight. The first phase of Cornucopia is coming to an end, and rewards and asset withdrawals will be carried out next week. The second phase of Cornucopia will start next Wednesday, and in addition to Cornucopia assets, it will also incentivize pools such as MOVE/USDC, MOVE/USDT, MOVE/WETH, and MOVE/WBTC.
